zh.Lower Peover, Cheshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭爾洛維爾 奧福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joan De Vernon於1417年7月3日出生在英國爾希布盧可時，她的父親Sir Richard de Vernon34歲，母親Lady Eleanor Hulse34歲。她於1439年與Robert de Fulleshurst II在英國爾法爾登結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1474年4月21日在英國爾瑟爾斯塔斯頓享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾洛維爾 奧福。

zh-hans.Lower Peover, Cheshire, England, United: 英国英格兰爾洛維爾 奧福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Joan De Vernon于1417年7月3日出生在英国爾希布盧可时，她的父亲Sir Richard de Vernon34岁，母亲Lady Eleanor Hulse34岁。她于1439年与Robert de Fulleshurst II在英国爾法爾登结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1474年4月21日在英国爾瑟爾斯塔斯頓享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾洛維爾 奧福。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joan De Vernon was born on 3 July 1417, in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Richard de Vernon, was 34 and her mother, Lady Eleanor Hulse, was 34. She married Robert de Fulleshurst II in 1439, in Farndon, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 21 April 1474, in Thurstaston, Cheshire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Lower Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joan De Vernon est née le 3 juillet 1417, à Shipbrook, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard de Vernon, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Lady Eleanor Hulse, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Fulleshurst II en 1439, à Farndon, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 avril 1474, à Thurstaston, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Lower Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Lower Peover, Cheshire, England, United: Lower Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joan De Vernon am 3. Juli 1417 in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard de Vernon 34 und ihre Mutter Lady Eleanor Hulse 34. Sie hat 1439 in Farndon, Cheshire, England Robert de Fulleshurst II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. April 1474 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Thurstaston, Cheshire, England und wurde in Lower Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan De Vernon è nata il il 3 luglio 1417 nel Shipbrook, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard de Vernon, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Lady Eleanor Hulse, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Fulleshurst II nel 1439, nel Farndon, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 21 aprile 1474, nel Thurstaston, Cheshire, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Lower Peover, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joan De Vernonが1417年7月3日にイギリスチェシュアイアシュイプブルークで生まれた時，父Sir Richard de Vernonは34歳，母Lady Eleanor Hulseは34歳であった。1439年にイギリスチェシュアイアファルンドンでRobert de Fulleshurst IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1474年4月21日にイギリスチェシュアイアスウルスタストンで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアロウエル ペオバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joan De Vernon(이)가 1417년 7월 3일 영국 체실르 시브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard de Vernon(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Eleanor Hulse(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1439년 영국 체실르 패른던에서 Robert de Fulleshurst II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1474년 4월 21일 영국 체실르 스르스타스턴에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 로어 프오버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan De Vernon nasceu em 3 de julho de 1417, em Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard de Vernon, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Lady Eleanor Hulse, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Fulleshurst II em 1439, em Farndon, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de abril de 1474, em Thurstaston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Lower Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joan De Vernon родилась 3 июля 1417 г. в местности шипбрук, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard de Vernon было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Eleanor Hulse, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Fulleshurst II в 1439 г. в местности фарндон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 21 апреля 1474 г. в местности турстастон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности лоуир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
